testsuite.name: registration.ParaBank Account Registration, Sign-In, and Security Validation

testcase.classname: registration.ParaBank Account Registration, Sign-In, and Security Validation
testcase.name: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
@TC_PB_04 @negative @login Scenario: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials Given the user opens the ParaBank application ... passed in 2.727s When the user attempts login with invalid credentials "nonexistent_test_user" and "WrongPassword99!" ... passed in 5.388s Then login fails showing error "The username and password could not be verified." ... passed in 0.022s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Captured stdout:
[SCENARIO] Starting scenario: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials [ENV] Starting browser context... [BROWSER] Initializing Playwright engine... [BROWSER] Launching CHROMIUM (Headless=False, SlowMo=500ms)... [BROWSER] Creating browser context... [BROWSER] Opening page viewport...
================================================== PLAYWRIGHT BROWSER LAUNCHED ================================================== Browser Engine : CHROMIUM Headless Mode : False Slow Motion Delay : 500 ms Default Timeout : 30000 ms Keep Browser Open : False Video Recording : Enabled Launch Status : Asserted & Verified ==================================================
[SCENARIO] Finished scenario: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials | Status: PASSED
[ENV] Screenshot saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/screenshots/failed_sign-in_-_invalid_username_and_password_credentials_passed.png [ENV] Closing browser session... [ENV] Video recording saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/videos/failed_sign-in_-_invalid_username_and_password_credentials_passed.webm
>>> [STEP] Given the user opens the ParaBank application [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: APPLICATION LANDING & HOMEPAGE OPEN ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Landing Page URL (contains) | index.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC | [PASS] Landing Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] ParaBank homepage loaded and validated successfully.
>>> [STEP] When the user attempts login with invalid credentials 'nonexistent_test_user' [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [LOGIN PAGE] Performing login for user: nonexistent_test_user [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'input[name='username']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'input[name='password']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully clicked element using: 'input[value='Log In']' [SUCCESS] Submitted login with invalid credentials.
>>> [STEP] Then login fails showing error 'The username and password could not be verified.' [LOGIN PAGE] Error message retrieved: 'The username and password could not be verified.'
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: SIGN-IN FAILURE - INVALID CREDENTIALS ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Current URL | N/A | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/login.htm | [PASS] Login Error Message (contains 'The username and password could not be verified.') | The username and password could not be verified. | The username and password could not be verified. | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Login error message verified successfully.
